extracted.title: Construction and Maintenance Schedule - Updated March 3, 2026
extracted.description:
As a courtesy, Northern Border Pipeline (NBPL) hereby notifies customers of the Construction and Maintenance Schedule posted under "Construction and Maintenance" on the Informational Postings website. NBPL reminds customers to please check the Maintenance Schedule on a regular basis.

Changes since last posting:
- Add – Zeeland Station 8 Spring Outage on 3/5
- Add – Wetonka Station 9 Spring Outage on 3/9 – 3/10
- Change – Saint Anthony Station 7 Spring Outage on 3/11 from previous dates of 3/11 – 3/12
- Add – Estelline Station 11 Spring Outage on 3/12 – 3/13
- Change – Glen Ullin Station 6 Bison XP Project Station Outage to 3/18 – 3/26 from previous dates of 3/18 – 3/27
- Add – Garvin Station 12 Main Lube Oil Valve Work on 3/27

Additionally, the following file(s) can be located on Informational Postings under Construction and Maintenance:
2026 NBPL maintenance schedule 030326.pdf
